name: Dark Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat cooker for 30 minutes.
2. In a 1-cup measure, dissolve yeast and warm water. Add sugar and ginger. Stir until dissolved and set in warm place to start working.
3. In a small saucepan, heat milk, salt, and butter until melted. Pour into mixer bowl.
4. Add molasses, whole wheat flour, soy flour, bran buds, and water. Mix well.
5. Add yeast mixture.
6. Beat at medium speed for about 2 minutes. Then add additional white flour (2 1/4 to 3 cups). Continue beating until dough comes away from bowl.
7. Pour into greased slow cooker baking pan, cover, and place in preheated cooker. Cover.
8. Cook on high for 3 hours. If desired, use 1 1/2 cups whole wheat flour and omit soy flour. Other grain flours may be used in place of whole wheat flour.
